qry:select.name: Referencia
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT sel02ref.oi_referencia, sel02ref.oi_req, sel02.c_req, sel02.d_req, org03.d_empresa, sel02.ca_estado, sel02.f_inicio, sel02.f_cierre, sel02ref.c_referencia, sel02ref.d_referencia, org04.d_puesto FROM SEL02_REQ as sel02, ORG03_EMPRESAS as org03, SEL02_REFERENCIAS AS sel02ref, ORG04_PUESTOS AS org04 JOIN sel02.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, sel02.oi_req INNER sel02ref.oi_req, sel02ref.oi_puesto INNER org04.oi_puesto WHERE sel02.oi_req={#FILTRO:@oi_req} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: UnidadesOrganizativas
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT org01.d_unidad_org FROM SEL02_REQ AS sel02, ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS AS org02, ORG01_UNI_ORG AS org01 JOIN sel02.oi_estructura INNER org02.oi_estructura, org02.oi_unidad_org INNER org01.oi_unidad_org WHERE sel02.oi_req={#FILTRO:@oi_req} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: PersonalSolicitante
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT org03.c_empresa, per02.e_numero_legajo, per01.d_ape_y_nom FROM SEL02_REQ AS sel02, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS per02, PER01_PERSONAL AS per01, ORG03_EMPRESAS AS org03 JOIN sel02.oi_personal_emp INNER per02.oi_personal_emp, per02.oi_personal INNER per01.oi_personal, per02.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa WHERE sel02.oi_req={#FILTRO:@oi_req} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: Referencias
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT sel02.c_referencia, sel02.oi_referencia, sel02.d_referencia, sel02.ca_estado, sel02.e_cant_personas, org04.d_puesto FROM SEL02_REFERENCIAS AS sel02, ORG04_PUESTOS AS org04 JOIN sel02.oi_puesto INNER org04.oi_puesto WHERE sel02.oi_req={#SOURCE:@oi_req} {%? (#FILTRO:@oi_referencia!='') {% AND sel02.oi_referencia = {#FILTRO:@oi_referencia} %} {% %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: Reclutados
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT sel13.oi_reclutado, sel13.c_reclutado, sel13.d_reclutado, sel13.oi_personal_emp, sel13.oi_postulante, sel13.c_estado, sel13.oi_referencia FROM SEL13_RECLUTADOS AS sel13 WHERE sel13.oi_referencia={#SOURCE:@oi_referencia} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: Examenes
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT sel13.oi_ref_res_exa, sel13.oi_exa_rec, sel07.d_examen, sel02.e_orden FROM SEL13_EXA_REC AS sel13, SEL02_REF_EXAMEN AS sel02, SEL07_EXAMENES AS sel07 JOIN sel13.oi_ref_examen INNER sel02.oi_ref_examen, sel02.oi_examen INNER sel07.oi_examen WHERE sel13.oi_reclutado={#SOURCE:@oi_reclutado} ORDER BY e_orden ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ResultadosExamenes
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT sel08.d_resultado, sel02r.oi_ref_res_exa, sel02r.o_ref_res_exa, sel02r.oi_ref_examen FROM SEL13_EXA_REC AS sel13, SEL02_REF_RES_EXA AS sel02r, SEL08_RESULTADOS AS sel08 JOIN sel13.oi_ref_res_exa INNER sel02r.oi_ref_res_exa, sel02r.oi_resultado INNER sel08.oi_resultado WHERE sel13.oi_ref_res_exa={#SOURCE:@oi_ref_res_exa} AND sel13.oi_exa_rec={#SOURCE:@oi_exa_rec} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: Subexamenes
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT sel13.oi_ref_res_sub, sel13.oi_subexa_rec, sel13.oi_ref_subexamen, sel07.d_subexamen FROM SEL13_SUBEXA_REC AS sel13, SEL02_REF_SUBEXA AS sel02, SEL07_SUBEXAMEN AS sel07 JOIN sel13.oi_ref_subexamen INNER sel02.oi_ref_subexamen, sel02.oi_subexamen INNER sel07.oi_subexamen WHERE sel13.oi_exa_rec={#SOURCE:@oi_exa_rec} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ResultadosSubexamenes
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT sel08.d_resultado, sel02.o_result_subexa, sel02.oi_ref_res_sub, sel02.oi_ref_subexamen FROM SEL13_SUBEXA_REC AS sel13, SEL02_REF_RES_SUB AS sel02, SEL08_RESULTADOS AS sel08 JOIN sel13.oi_ref_res_sub INNER sel02.oi_ref_res_sub, sel02.oi_resultado INNER sel08.oi_resultado WHERE sel13.oi_ref_res_sub={#SOURCE:@oi_ref_res_sub} AND sel13.oi_subexa_rec={#SOURCE:@oi_subexa_rec} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: Factores
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT sel17.d_factor, sel06.d_escala, sel13.oi_ref_fact, sel02.oi_factor, sel13.oi_escala FROM SEL13_FAC_EV_REC AS sel13, SEL02_REF_FACT AS sel02, SEL06_ESCALAS AS sel06, SEL17_FACTORES AS sel17 JOIN sel13.oi_ref_fact INNER sel02.oi_ref_fact, sel02.oi_factor INNER sel17.oi_factor, sel13.oi_escala INNER sel06.oi_escala WHERE sel13.oi_subexa_rec={#SOURCE:@oi_subexa_rec} ')/ROWS/ROW
